# Goal: force the relocalize failure branch so the normal route proves its fixed-start/odometry fallback behavior.
# Setup: kLocalizationTuneTest is set to 0. At autonomous start, keep all distance sensors invalid until the robot begins moving: cover each sensor with a flat object about 2-3 inches away, or otherwise make fewer than two sensors produce valid 5-96 inch wall readings.
# Validation target: relocalize_success=0 or a non-commit failure status, start-relative route still runs, applied corrections stay suppressed during motion, and there is no unsafe pose jump.
